cleanup_policies.description: Defines the cleanup policies for the repository, specifying rules for automatically deleting or retaining artifacts based on conditions like age or number of versions.
cleanup_policies.type: list(object({action: optional(string),id: string,condition: list(object({newer_than: optional(string),older_than: optional(string),package_name_prefixes: optional(list(string)),tag_prefixes: optional(list(string)),tag_state: optional(string),version_name_prefixes: optional(list(string))})),most_recent_versions: list(object({keep_count: optional(number),package_name_prefixes: optional(list(string))}))}))

cleanup_policy_dry_run.description: Enables simulation of cleanup policies without deleting artifacts, useful for testing policy behavior.

description.description: Specifies the purpose or details of the repository, such as its intended usage or contents.

docker_config.description: Specifies the Docker repository configuration, including settings for authentication and access control.

format.description: Specifies the format of packages stored in the repository (e.g., DOCKER, MAVEN, NPM).

kms_key_name.description: Specifies the Cloud KMS key to be used for encrypting the repository's contents. Must be in the same region as the repository.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the repository, typically used for metadata or filtering purposes.

location.description: Specifies the GCP region where the repository will be created; must be a valid region supported by Artifact Registry.

maven_config.description: Specifies the Maven repository configuration, including optional settings like repository policy and versioning, for the Artifact Registry repository.

mode.description: Defines the format of the repository, such as DOCKER, MAVEN, NPM, or PYTHON, determining the type of artifacts it can store.

remote_repository_config.description: Configuration settings for a remote repository, including the source location and authentication details.
remote_repository_config.type: list(object({description: optional(string),disable_upstream_validation: optional(bool),apt_repository: list(object({public_repository: list(object({repository_base: string,repository_path: string}))})),common_repository: list(object({uri: string})),docker_repository: list(object({public_repository: optional(string),custom_repository: list(object({uri: optional(string)}))})),maven_repository: list(object({public_repository: optional(string),custom_repository: list(object({uri: optional(string)}))})),npm_repository: list(object({public_repository: optional(string),custom_repository: list(object({uri: optional(string)}))})),python_repository: list(object({public_repository: optional(string),custom_repository: list(object({uri: optional(string)}))})),upstream_credentials: list(object({username_password_credentials: list(object({password_secret_version: optional(string),username: optional(string)}))})),yum_repository: list(object({public_repository: list(object({repository_base: string,repository_path: string}))}))}))

repository_id.description: Unique identifier for the repository within the Artifact Registry, must be globally unique.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for operations on the repository, such as creation, update, or deletion.

virtual_repository_config.description: Defines the configuration for a virtual repository, including settings for upstream repositories and caching behavior.

vulnerability_scanning_config.description: Configures the vulnerability scanning settings for the repository, specifying whether to enable or disable scanning for container images.
